top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference documents for The Customs (Reliefs from a Liability to Import Duty and Miscellaneous Amendments) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Find the documents for details of the conditions in which a 'good' may be eligible for a relief from the standard tariff rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference Documents for The Customs Tariff (Preferential Trade Arrangements) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Find the UK's preferential tariffs and Rules of Origin for the agreements contained within the Customs Tariff (Preferential Trade Arrangements) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference Documents for The Customs (Tariff Quotas) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Check the documents that detail product specific tariff-rate quotas, including the individual product volumes and rates, and also list of eligible goods and their authorised uses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference document for authorised use: eligible goods and authorised uses
top_signals.summary: List of eligible goods and their authorised uses.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Reference Documents for The Customs Tariff (Suspension of Import Duty Rates) (EU Exit) Regulations 2020
top_signals.summary: Find out about the tariff suspensions that apply from the end of the transition period.
